records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm back inside the mansion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm back inside the mansion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm back inside the mansion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place makes no sense...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place makes no sense...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place makes no sense...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I regret dragging you into all this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I regret dragging you into all this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I regret dragging you into all this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your job was just to exorcise evil spirits. Maybe it's best if you leave now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your job was just to exorcise evil spirits. Maybe it's best if you leave now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your job was just to exorcise evil spirits. Maybe it's best if you leave now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now? After all this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now? After all this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now? After all this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. If it's just one evil spirit, I can probably handle it myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. If it's just one evil spirit, I can probably handle it myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. If it's just one evil spirit, I can probably handle it myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure you're properly compensated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure you're properly compensated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure you're properly compensated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption rays I studied here are a bit different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corruption rays I studied here are a bit different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption rays I studied here are a bit different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I need to check your sickness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I need to check your sickness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I need to check your sickness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you heard of the <color=#ffd34c>Aberrant Counterside Effect</color> that was first observed <color=#ffd34c>ten years ago</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you heard of the <color=#ffd34c>Aberrant Counterside Effect</color> that was first observed <color=#ffd34c>ten years ago</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you heard of the <color=#ffd34c>Aberrant Counterside Effect</color> that was first observed <color=#ffd34c>ten years ago</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's just one evil spirit, that doesn't mean it's not dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's just one evil spirit, that doesn't mean it's not dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's just one evil spirit, that doesn't mean it's not dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially in an environment filled with Corruption rays, who knows what could happen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially in an environment filled with Corruption rays, who knows what could happen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially in an environment filled with Corruption rays, who knows what could happen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, so this is how he's gonna try and cut my pay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, so this is how he's gonna try and cut my pay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, so this is how he's gonna try and cut my pay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not a chance! I'll sweep every last speck of dust out of this place!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not a chance! I'll sweep every last speck of dust out of this place!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not a chance! I'll sweep every last speck of dust out of this place!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... you make a fair point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... you make a fair point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... you make a fair point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The blood scent is strongest around here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The blood scent is strongest around here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The blood scent is strongest around here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It couldn't have gone far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It couldn't have gone far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It couldn't have gone far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm counting on you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm counting on you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm counting on you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have some matters to attend to. Let me know if anything important happens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have some matters to attend to. Let me know if anything important happens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have some matters to attend to. Let me know if anything important happens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Another lab...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Another lab...?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Why does one person need this many labs?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why does one person need this many labs?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, as long as I catch that nun, it's none of my business.
